name: Hiram Walker Amaretto Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat egg whites until stiff.
2. Gradually beat in sugar one tablespoon at a time until stiff and glossy.
3. Add salt.
4. Gradually beat in amaretto liqueur.
5. Fold in flaked coconut and finely chopped almonds.
6. Line cookie sheets with foil.
7. Drop mixture by heaping teaspoons onto the foil.
8. Bake at 325°F for 20 minutes.
9. Cool cookies on foil.
10. Store in an airtight container.
